sources.claim: Speak raised $78M Series C at $1B valuation backed by OpenAI, Accel, Khosla Ventures
sources.excerpt: OpenAI-backed Speak raises $78M at $1B valuation to help users learn languages by talking out loud

sources.claim: Language learning apps generated $1.54B in 2025, +18.8% YoY; Duolingo $1.03B revenue market leader
sources.excerpt: Language learning apps generated $1.54 billion in 2025, a 18.8% year-on-year increase, with Duolingo making the most revenue of all apps at $1.03 billion in 2025.

sources.claim: Online language learning market $22.1B in 2024, growing to $54.8B by 2030 at 16.6% CAGR
sources.excerpt: The global online language learning market size was estimated at USD 22115.7 million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 54833.2 million by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 16.6% from 2025 to 2030.

sources.claim: Duolingo FY2025 revenue $1.037B (+39% YoY); 12.2M paid subscribers; 52.7M DAUs
sources.excerpt: Duolingo reported $1,037.6 million in full-year revenue for FY2025, up 39% from $748 million the year before. Paid subscribers grew 28% to 12.2 million. Daily active users climbed 30% to 52.7 million in Q4 2025.

sources.claim: Speak reached $100M ARR with 500+ enterprise clients including KPMG and HD Hyundai
sources.excerpt: Speak for Business bringing effective English learning to employers everywhere, with 200+ customers across various industries and 85% adoption rate among employees.

sources.claim: ELSA Speak raised $60M total ($23M Series C Sep 2023); 2.5M+ users
sources.excerpt: ELSA Speak has raised a total funding of $60M over 9 rounds from 25 investors, with their latest funding round being $23M on September 12, 2023.

sources.claim: Language learning apps market $6.34B in 2024, $7.36B in 2025, projected $24.39B by 2033 at 16.15% CAGR
sources.excerpt: Straits Research valued the global language learning apps market at $6.34 billion in 2024, with a projection of $7.36 billion for 2025 and $24.39 billion by 2033 at a 16.15% CAGR.

sources.claim: $400B global corporate learning market being disrupted by AI tutors (Feb 2026)
sources.excerpt: New Research: How AI Transforms $400 Billion Of Corporate Learning

sources.claim: Duolingo Q2 2025: 41% revenue growth YoY; 40% DAU growth
sources.excerpt: Duolingo rides AI momentum with fastest course launch and 40% DAU growth in Q2 2025.

sources.claim: HelloTalk 70M+ registered users in 200+ countries supporting 150+ languages
sources.excerpt: HelloTalk has 70M+ registered users across 200+ countries and 260+ languages supported.

sources.claim: Babbel revenue €352M; 10M+ subscribers; profitable and bootstrapped
sources.excerpt: Babbel reported €352 million (~$383 million) in revenue.

sources.claim: Forbes: AI startup racing Duolingo to replace human language tutors
sources.excerpt: This Startup Is Racing Duolingo To Replace Human Language Tutors With AI — Forbes deep dive on Speak's model and the broader market disruption.

unverified_claims.claim: 70% of language learners avoid speaking practice due to embarrassment
unverified_claims.note: Commonly cited statistic in EdTech; specific sourcing not confirmed during research — treat as [unverified industry estimate]

unverified_claims.claim: 68% of language learners comfortable practicing conversation with AI over a stranger
unverified_claims.note: Survey figure cited in market commentary; original survey source not confirmed during research — treat as [unverified]
